title: Village Spirits
description: Village Spirits adds spirit versions of villagers and other mobs that appear at night, during rain, or during thunderstorms.
body:
Welcome to **Village Spirits**! This mod adds ghostly versions of villagers and animals to your Minecraft world. When creatures die, they don't just disappear - they become spirits that roam your world at night!

![Villager spirits](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd837b2ccfe5faca6077f6f552b08949e12548c2.jpeg)

**What Are Spirits?**

Spirits are ghostly versions of normal mobs. They look transparent and mysterious, appearing only when it's dark or stormy outside. During the day, they become invisible and you can't interact with them.

_The mod includes 6 different types of spirits:_

1. **Spirit Villager** - A ghostly villager
2. **Spirit Pig** - A ghostly pig
3. **Spirit Sheep** - A ghostly sheep
4. **Spirit Cow** - A ghostly cow
5. **Spirit Chicken** - A ghostly chicken
6. **Spirit Iron Golem** - A ghostly iron golem

**When Do Spirits Appear?**

Spirits become visible and can be interacted with during:
- **Night time** - When the sun goes down
- **Rain** - When it's raining
- **Thunderstorms** - When there's lightning and thunder

**How to Cure Spirits?**

_Want to bring a spirit back to life? You can cure them!_

1. Wait for night, rain, or a thunderstorm (spirits must be visible)
2. Hold an **Enchanted Golden Apple** in your hand
3. Right-click on the spirit
4. The spirit will transform back into a normal mob!

**Spirit Villagers have a special ability:**

- **Give them Soul Sand or Soul Soil** (right-click at night, during rain, or during thunderstorms)
- They will reward you with **1-3 XP points**
- The Soul Sand or Soul Soil will be consumed

This is a great way to get some extra experience points!

**Getting Started**

1. Install the mod in your Minecraft 1.20.1 with Forge
2. Start playing normally
3. When mobs die, watch for spirits appearing!
4. Use spawn eggs from the creative menu to create spirits anytime
5. Try curing spirits back to normal with Enchanted Golden Apples

**Tips**

- Keep some Enchanted Golden Apples handy if you want to cure spirits
- Spirit Villagers are great for farming XP - give them Soul Sand or Soul Soil!
- Spirits are perfect for spooky builds and atmosphere
- Use spawn eggs to create baby spirits for your builds
